result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 6:   WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), normalized AS (
  SELECT a.case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.oldvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS old_owner,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.newvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS new_owner
  FROM assignments a
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ownerid,'#','')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.handled_cases,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t USING (agent_id)
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, handled_cases DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), normalized AS (
  SELECT a.case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.oldvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS old_owner,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.newvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS new_owner
  FROM assignments a
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ownerid,'#','')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.handled_cases,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t USING (agent_id)
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, handled_cases DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), normalized AS (
  SELECT a.case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.oldvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS old_owner,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.newvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS new_owner
  FROM assignments a
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ownerid,'#','')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.handled_cases,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t USING (agent_id)
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, handled_cases DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
), normalized AS (
  SELECT a.case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.oldvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS old_owner,
         TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(COALESCE(a.newvalue__c,''), '#','')) AS new_owner
  FROM assignments a
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ownerid,'#','')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.handled_cases,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t USING (agent_id)
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, handled_cases DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
